probe_method: For each model: load via /api/chat, send keep_alive:0 request, verify unload via /api/ps at 0s and 5s intervals.

probes.error: Model failed to load (HTTP 500: llama runner process has terminated)

evidence_summary: All 3 loadable models unload reliably within 5 seconds of keep_alive:0 request. Unload is not immediate — there is a grace period of 1-5 seconds. GLM cannot load, so unload is untestable.
grace_period_note: Models show in /api/ps immediately after keep_alive:0 but are gone within 5s. This is consistent Ollama behavior — unload is deferred, not synchronous.
